scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @status/api & npm run dev -w @status/worker & npm run dev -w @status/admin
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build -w @status/admin
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @status/shared && npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @status/api && npm run build -w @status/worker
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @status/shared && npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @status/api
